Vastu Shastra

Vastu Shastra Guide

Ancient Indian science of architecture for harmony and positive energy.

Eight Directions in Vastu

Each direction is governed by a deity and element

North
South
East
West
North-East
South-East
South-West
North-West
North
Water

Deity: Kubera (Wealth)

Colors: Blue, Green

South
Fire

Deity: Yama (Dharma)

Colors: Red, Orange

East
Air

Deity: Indra (King of Gods)

Colors: White, Light Blue

West
Space

Deity: Varuna (Rain God)

Colors: Blue, White

North-East
Water

Deity: Ishanya (Shiva)

Colors: Yellow, Light Blue

South-East
Fire

Deity: Agni (Fire God)

Colors: Red, Pink

South-West
Earth

Deity: Nairuti (Demon)

Colors: Brown, Yellow

North-West
Air

Deity: Vayu (Wind God)

Colors: White, Grey

About Vastu Shastra

Vastu Shastra is ancient Indian science of architecture dating back 5,000 years.

Based on five elements and eight directions for positive energy flow.

Simple remedies can help balance energy in modern spaces.
